facebook.caption:
POV: you picked the resort on Khem Beach and everyone asks which one it is.

New World Phu Quoc Resort. 4.7 stars across 5,287 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency.

Khem Beach is quieter than the main strip. The resort sits right on it. You do the math.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
